INVOKE.COMMENT: get dependency codes for challenge code

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: get award tier for period status COMPLETEDINTIME (where period status is given as NULL)

INVOKE.COMMENT: get award tier for period status COMPLETEDINTIME (where period status is given as NULL)
get award tier for period status COMPLETEDINTIME and for dependency codes

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: get award tier by explicitly passing period status as COMPLETEDINTIME

INVOKE.COMMENT: get award tier by explicitly passing period status as COMPLETEDINTIME
get award tier by explicitly passing period status as COMPLETEDINTIME and for dependency codes
